title: SMP's Commands
description: This mod adds the /rtp and the /lobby commands, useful for SMP(s)!
body:
# SMP's Commands

---

[![Join our Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/074fa02cb8708dd32f365967978fbb5a818c93af_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/DKtuXPq8fE)

---

This mod allows you to make you world and server like a real SMP, with the /hub and the /rtp command.
This a work-in-progress mod: to suggest something, write in our Discord server!

# 📖 How to use
First, create a new normal world. Once generated, find the world center (0, 0) and build a small platform, so the player typing /lobby in the chat will get teleported there. Then, when a player types /rtp in the chat the games teleports him to a random location of your server!
